description: A revocation feed whose signature verifies correctly but whose own version is lower than the verifier's previously-observed high-water mark for the feed (a captured-and-replayed earlier feed) and whose signing_time exceeds its own stated max-age (the same freeze an attacker withholding a fresher feed would produce) MUST be refused at verification-order step 9 before revoked_keys/revoked_artifacts are consulted -- CHI-074 ties the feed's own freshness and rollback protection to the same monotonic-version and max-age discipline as every other role, independent of any one channel's own index version.
